  • Reduced design and development time with a Material Design-based UI library built and maintained with the team.
  • Ideated user-centered solutions through heuristic evaluations, white-boarding sessions, and participatory design workshops.
  • Delivered user flows, wireframes, mockups, and high-fidelity interactive prototypes to stakeholders.
  • Collaborated with cross-functional agile teams on intuitive mobile and web experiences.
